{{Shell
|name=Michael's Light
|image=Michael's Light.png
|description=To combat demons, Archangel Michael shone his light on the mortal world, and some Snail Shell have been blessed!
|affct=FTH
|hard=ATK
|source=Divine Chaos Chest (0.1%)
|color=orange
|earth=9
|water=9
|fire=10
|wind=14
|form=Angel
|element=Water
|realm=Bharata
|orangehard=HP
}}
